name: NOVA
description: NovaShield is an on-chain security engine for Solana that uses AI and threat intelligence to analyze transactions, tokens, addresses, dApps, and URLs — helping you predict and block threats before users click Sign. Smart Contract / Multi-Sig Wallet: A wallet designed for teams and security-conscious users. It includes features like Time Locks (scheduling transactions), Spending Limits, and Roles/Sub-Accounts for managing permissions. Privacy Transfers: A feature that allows for private on-chain transfers, concealing the sender, receiver, and transaction amounts. Security API: A developer tool that allows other apps to integrate Nova's security stack.
